items.title: DeMarcus Lawrence is back for 13th season with "more to give"
items.summary: Seahawks edge rusher DeMarcus Lawrence did not attend the start of the team's voluntary offseason workouts until this week.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Messi to represent Argentina at sixth World Cup
items.summary: Lionel Messi will play in a sixth World Cup as he captains holders Argentina at the 2026 tournament.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Is Knight's sluggish form a concern for England?
items.summary: England start their T20 World Cup campaign on 12 June with question marks surrounding their batting line-up, with veteran Heather Knight's form in the spotlight.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
